title: Internal fault when cross-class calling with DPI

features.name: dpi_c_import_in_package
features.description: Code should include a DPI-C context function import statement inside a SystemVerilog package

features.name: chandle_type_definition
features.description: Code should include a typedef using chandle type for opaque handle representation

features.name: dpi_wrapper_function_in_package
features.description: Code should include a package-level function that wraps and calls a DPI-imported function, returning a chandle type

features.name: class_constructor_chained_call
features.description: Code should include a class method where a DPI wrapper function result is passed directly as an argument to a class constructor

features.name: cross_class_dpi_invocation
features.description: Code should include a class method that calls a package DPI function and passes the result to a different class constructor
